Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: For now, let's keep the aircraft formation on Synchronized. This will order each aircraft to perform the same order you issue to the Formation Leader.
Let's setup an attack by our Ko-45 flight on the surface targets to the southwest. Use the Tactical Display to create a waypoint about 25nm northeast of the surface contacts.
Remember that you can use the Map Tools at bottom right of the Tactical Display to measure distances, create ellipses around units, and attach range circles to enemy contacts!
